creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
This will update DCC to latest release:

- Fix broken `dccifd -Q` reported by Mark Thomas.                                                                                                                                                                                         

- Fix dccifd and dccproc parsing of Return-Path:<> reported by Wolfgang Breyha.

- Significantly improve compression on server-to-server flooding.                                                                                                                                                                         

http://www.dcc-servers.net/dcc/dcc-tree/CHANGES
